scripts.dev: npm run build && node scripts/dev-server.mjs dist
scripts.preview: npm run build && node scripts/dev-server.mjs dist
scripts.test:form-validation: rm -rf dist-tests/form-validation && tsc src/form-validation.ts --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --strict --skipLibCheck --outDir dist-tests/form-validation && node --test test/form-validation.test.mjs
scripts.test:targeted-validation-update: rm -rf dist-tests/targeted-validation-update && tsc src/form-validation.ts src/targeted-validation-update.ts src/mutation-lifecycle.ts --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --strict --skipLibCheck --outDir dist-tests/targeted-validation-update && node --test test/targeted-validation-update.test.mjs
scripts.test:order-mutation-lifecycle: rm -rf dist-tests/order-mutation-lifecycle && tsc src/form-validation.ts src/mutation-lifecycle.ts src/order-mutation-lifecycle.ts --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --strict --skipLibCheck --outDir dist-tests/order-mutation-lifecycle && node --test test/order-mutation-lifecycle.test.mjs
